final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,         // Clock input
    input reset,       // Reset signal
    input [31:0] data, // 32-bit parallel input
    output reg serial_out // 1-bit serialized output
);
    reg [5:0] obf_bit_index; // to keep track of which bit to send

    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            obf_bit_index <= 0;
            serial_out <= 0;
        end else if (obf_bit_index < 32) begin
            serial_out <= data[31 - obf_bit_index]; // Send MSB first
            obf_bit_index <= obf_bit_index + 1; // Move to next bit
        end
    end
endmodule
